overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, atmospheric gothic mansion interior featuring ornate wood-paneled walls, towering bookshelves, and warm lamp lighting. The player character navigates through staircases, corridors, and rooms with a slow, deliberate walking pace typical of horror game environments.

events.description: descends the staircase and enters a wood-paneled corridor with red carpet

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down a wooden staircase with ornate carved railings, turning at the landing to enter the corridor

entered.detail: dark wooden stairs with worn steps and ornate carved balustrades
intricately carved dark wood balustrade with decorative posts
black wrought iron railing visible on the upper landing
dark wood paneled walls with vertical molding
brass wall-mounted lamp with warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wooden staircase landing with ornate carved railings. The camera descends the stairs, passing wrought iron railings on the upper level, and transitions into a narrow wood-paneled corridor illuminated by warm wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor library corridor with bookshelves

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor, observing the tall bookshelves and framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelf with metal grating filled with leather-bound books
ornate hanging light fixture with multiple bulbs
gold-framed oil painting of a figure in historical dress
wooden balustrade overlooking the lower floor

segments.scene_description: Walking along an upper floor corridor with red carpet, passing tall ornate bookshelves on the right and a wooden railing overlooking the lower level on the left. Warm light from wall sconces and a distant chandelier illuminates the wood-paneled walls and framed portraits.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to side study room

events.description: approaches and enters a small side room through an arched doorway

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor toward an arched doorway, entering a small side room with a desk and portrait

entered.detail: wooden pedestal with a display case containing an object
arched wooden doorway leading to a smaller room
compact study room visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the corridor past display pedestals and framed portraits, the camera approaches an arched doorway. At the end of the segment, the camera enters the small side room, transitioning from the main corridor into a more intimate study space.

scene_state.functional_zone: small study room with green rug

events.description: exits the small room through the archway and descends to a lower level

agents.ego_description: examining the small room briefly before exiting through the archway and descending a short staircase to a lower floor

entered.detail: large framed portrait of a woman on the far wall
ornate green patterned rug covering the floor
antique wooden writing desk with papers and books
metal security gate in front of bookshelves

segments.scene_description: Inside a small study room with a green rug and a large portrait on the wall. The camera moves around the wooden desk, then exits back through the archway, descending a short staircase to a lower level with metal-gated bookshelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower library with caged bookshelves and reading tables

events.description: moves into a darker section of the library illuminated by a candelabra

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower library, passing reading tables and tall bookshelves, moving toward a darker area

entered.detail: tall standing candelabra with multiple lit candles
large wooden reading table with books stacked on top
glass display case with artifacts on a wooden stand
green glass banker's lamp on a side table

segments.scene_description: Exploring a wider lower library room with red carpet and tall bookshelves behind metal grates. The camera passes a wooden reading table and moves toward a darker area illuminated by a tall candelabra, with display cases and a green banker's lamp visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to closed wooden door

events.description: slows down while approaching the large wooden door at the corridor's end

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow corridor lined with display cases, slowing as they approach a large closed wooden door

entered.detail: glass jar containing preserved specimens on a display shelf
large dark wooden door with diagonal bracing at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: Proceeding down a narrow corridor with green carpet, passing display cases containing specimen jars. The camera slows as it approaches a large wooden door with diagonal bracing at the end of the hallway, ending with a close view of the door surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic mansion that transitions from an ornate upper gallery into a secluded, specimen-filled lower corridor. It begins by descending a wooden staircase with carved railings, moving seamlessly into a narrow, wood-paneled corridor where warm wall sconces illuminate red carpets and towering bookshelves. As the camera passes framed portraits and display pedestals, it briefly enters an intimate study with a green rug and wooden desk before retreating through the archway to descend toward a lower library. The scene then expands into a wider room featuring bookshelves behind metal grates and a glowing banker's lamp, before shifting into a narrower hallway with green carpeting and specimen jars. Finally, the camera slows its pace as it approaches a large, diagonally braced wooden door that looms at the end of the passage.
